new_findings.pattern: I really love some features you offer.
new_findings.rationale: This specific expression of affection for features is unique to the synthetic batch.

new_findings.pattern: It's like all my photos are just floating away into the void!
new_findings.rationale: This metaphorical expression about photos is not found in the real batch.

new_findings.pattern: I must say, the whole situation has been quite disappointing.
new_findings.rationale: This phrase conveys disappointment in a way that is not present in the real samples.
